title: Application Analyst - Healthcare (PRIT)
description:
Overview

The Application Analyst will be part of the Digital and Information Technology team, responsible for implementing, maintaining, and supporting IT systems. These systems primarily include the Electronic Medical Record (EMR) system and other clinical management systems. The role involves close collaboration with hospital and clinical stakeholders to ensure IT systems effectively support operational and business needs.

Responsibilities

  • Work with stakeholders to understand business operations and requirements.

  • Recommend suitable IT solutions to enhance and streamline business processes.

  • Diagnose and resolve system issues promptly, coordinating with vendors and cross-functional teams.

  • Prepare and maintain IT documentation, including functional, design, and test specifications, user guides, and operational manuals.

  • Manage and support User Acceptance Testing (UAT).

  • Conduct end-user training sessions effectively.

  • Assist in procurement, acquisition, and implementation of IT systems under the guidance of the Reporting Officer.

  • Provide support coverage during team members’ absence.

  • Perform other related duties as assigned.

  • Demonstrate commitment to meeting project timelines and deliverables.

Requirements

  • Degree in Information Technology or a related discipline.

  • At least 1 - 3 years of relevant experience will be an advantage.

  • Good understanding of process and workflow mapping.

  • Experience in IT systems implementation, preferably Electronic Medical Record (EMR) or other clinical systems (preferred).

  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications such as Excel and PowerPoint.

Interested candidates, who wish to apply for the advertised position, please email us an updated copy of your resume.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
PERSOL is Asia-Pacific’s leading Staffing and HR solutions partner, operating across 13 markets with deep local insight and regional scale. With more than 80 offices and decades of experience, we deliver integrated workforce solutions that are tailored, tech-enabled, and designed for the dynamic world of work.

We combine human expertise with smart technology to help organisations solve workforce challenges, unlock potential, and stay ahead of change. From recruitment and talent management to workforce strategy and advisory, our collaborative approach puts your goals at the centre.

In 2025, we came together under the PERSOL name — reflecting our bold vision for the future of work and our Group’s Vision: Work and Smile.

Whether you’re building teams, growing careers, or transforming how work gets done, we’re here.

For more information, please visit www.persolsingapore.com
